source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines adult gastroenteritis use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped adult acute diarrhea and gastroenteritis presentation terms within DHA telehealth.

added_items.final_wording: Defines acute diarrheal illness and records stool frequency, duration, nausea, vomiting, fever, abdominal pain, exposure pattern, and dehydration features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Adults – 41
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth gastroenteritis documentation; partial for a broad diarrhea workflow without an adult or acute-duration filter.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines acute diarrheal illness and records stool frequency, duration, nausea, vomiting, fever, abdominal pain, exposure pattern, and dehydration features.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped duration, frequency, consistency, blood or mucus, fever, vomiting, exposure, hydration, medicine history, presets, and structured history.

added_items.final_wording: Lists shock, severe dehydration, intractable vomiting, severe abdominal pain, prolonged symptoms, older age, comorbidity, pregnancy, antibiotic exposure, nocturnal diarrhea, and bloody or black stool.
